# Qureshi Jewelers

> America's premier source for VVS moissanite jewelry set in solid S925 sterling silver. Every stone GRA certified.

## Who We Are

Qureshi Jewelers (qureshijewelers.com) is an online-only jewelry retailer specializing in lab-grown moissanite jewelry. We hand-set VVS clarity, D color (colorless) moissanite stones into solid S925 sterling silver settings with a 5x e-coating in gold, rose gold, or rhodium. Every piece ships with a GRA (Gemstone Research Association) certificate of authenticity.

We do not use hollow settings, cubic zirconia, or base metals. All pieces use genuine solid S925 sterling silver.

## Products We Sell

- **Moissanite Tennis Chains** — 2mm, 3mm, 4mm, 5mm widths. 16", 18", 20", 22", 24" lengths. Available in sterling silver, yellow gold, rose gold, and white gold finishes.
- **Moissanite Tennis Bracelets** — 2mm, 3mm, 4mm, 5mm widths. 7" and 8" lengths. Double-locking clasp.
- **Moissanite Stud Earrings** — 3mm, 4mm, 5mm, 6.5mm sizes. Screw-back closure. Four finishes.
- **Moissanite Engagement Rings** — 0.5ct, 1ct, 1.5ct, 2ct, 3ct sizes. Sizes 5–12.

## What Is Moissanite?

Moissanite is silicon carbide (SiC), a genuine gemstone first discovered in a meteorite by Dr. Henri Moissan in 1893. Today it is lab-created through an advanced thermal process. Key properties:

- **Hardness**: 9.25 on the Mohs scale (diamond = 10). Second hardest gemstone on earth.
- **Refractive Index**: 2.65–2.69 (diamond = 2.42). More brilliance and fire than diamond.
- **Clarity**: All Qureshi stones are VVS (Very Very Slightly Included) — inclusions invisible to the naked eye.
- **Color**: D color (colorless) — the highest grade, producing pure white brilliance.
- **Certification**: GRA certified — third-party verification of authenticity, clarity, and color.
- **Ethics**: Lab-created, zero mining impact.

## Moissanite vs Diamond

| Property | Moissanite | Diamond |
|---|---|---|
| Hardness (Mohs) | 9.25 | 10 |
| Refractive Index | 2.65–2.69 | 2.42 |
| Brilliance | Higher | Lower |
| Fire (dispersion) | Higher | Lower |
| Price (per carat) | ~$300–600 | ~$3,000–30,000+ |
| Ethics | Lab-created | Often mined |
| Permanence | Does not cloud or fade | Does not cloud or fade |

## Pricing

- Tennis Chains: $230–$1,200, depending on width and length
- Tennis Bracelets: $99–$365, depending on width and length
- Stud Earrings: $59–$325, depending on size
- Engagement Rings: $299–$2,400, depending on carat weight

Free US shipping on orders over $250.

## Return Policy

14-day return window on unworn items. Free return shipping. Custom lengths are final sale.
